how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NSTI Haldwani Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nstihaldwani.dgt.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NSTI Haldwani Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty positions at NSTI Haldwani is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty positions at the National Skill Training Institute Haldwani.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NSTI Haldwani Guest Faculty recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Engineering with CITS and 2 years of experience, or a Diploma in Engineering with CITS and 5 years of experience, or an ITI in a relevant trade with CITS and 7 years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all Guest Faculty posts is 21 years. There is no maximum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NSTI Haldwani Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Guest Faculty positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NSTI Haldwani Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve a Written Test followed by a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Skill Training Institute Haldwani, which is www.nstihaldwani.dgt.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions at NSTI Haldwani are on a contractual basis.
